faq.question: How does Milgard A250 Thermally Improved Aluminum compare with other Milgard collections?
faq.answer: Compare Milgard A250 Thermally Improved Aluminum with sibling collections on frame construction, visible glass area, energy ratings, finish options, warranty and installed cost. Tuscany uses a classic frame profile while Trinsic maximizes visible glass with narrow frames.
